concepts.finding: metapath2vec: heterogeneous network embedding using meta-path-based random walks. Meta-path specifies the node type sequence (e.g., APVPA for Author-Paper-Venue-Paper-Author). Heterogeneous Skip-Gram conditions on node type during prediction. metapath2vec++ uses softmax over same-type nodes only. Outperforms DeepWalk and LINE on heterogeneous graph tasks by 15-30%.
concepts.implication: Meta-path-based walks capture typed relationships in heterogeneous keyword-intent-document graphs. Different meta-paths capture different semantics (keyword-document-keyword vs keyword-intent-keyword). Type-conditional negative sampling improves efficiency.
concepts.open_question: What meta-path schema best captures keyword-intent relationships? How to design effective meta-paths without domain expertise?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: metapath2vec with well-designed meta-paths (Keyword-Document-Intent, Keyword-Intent-Keyword) produces more coherent intent clusters than homogeneous DeepWalk on the same graph.
